scripts.predev: npm run build -w @asset-optimiser/shared-types && npm run build -w @asset-optimiser/shared-utils
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @asset-optimiser/backend" "npm run dev -w @asset-optimiser/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @asset-optimiser/shared-types && npm run build -w @asset-optimiser/shared-utils && npm run build -w @asset-optimiser/backend && npm run build -w @asset-optimiser/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @asset-optimiser/backend && npm run typecheck -w @asset-optimiser/frontend
